projectDescription: A beautiful and interactive web application that deconstructs words into their meaningful parts and explains their etymology using AI-powered analysis and visual graphs.
keyFeatures: Interactive word analysis with AI-powered etymology breakdown
Beautiful React Flow visualization of word components and their relationships
Support for multiple AI models (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini)
Real-time graph visualization with progressive word combination layers
Dark mode support with elegant UI
ISR caching and pre-generation for top 1000 common words
publicApiSurface: POST /api - Word deconstruction endpoint with structured AI response
GET /w/[word] - Dynamic word page with ISR caching
WordDeconstructor component - Main interactive UI component
wordSchema - Zod schema for word structure validation
React Flow custom nodes: WordChunkNode, OriginNode, CombinedNode
